compiled_state.title: merge-to-main.sh version_bump: amend interrupted by SIGURG leaves state=complete but commit unchanged
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body:
Root cause confirmed: same as 34cc-526c. On --resume, _phase_sync is skipped → cd "$MAIN_REPO" never runs → _phase_version_bump runs in worktree CWD. git commit --amend in the worktree amends the worktree HEAD (already pushed to origin). state file records version_bump=complete (the amend did run — but on the wrong repo). MAIN_REPO HEAD is unchanged.

Fix: same as 34cc-526c — adding cd "$MAIN_REPO" at the start of _phase_merge makes _phase_version_bump inherit the correct CWD.

Tests: tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-resume-cwd.sh (same suite).
comments.author: Test
